semantic.role: Configuration for code pattern recognition in static analysis
responsibilities: Defining import pattern syntax (named, default, namespace)
Defining export pattern syntax (function, class, interface, type, const, let, var, default, list)
Defining usage pattern syntax (call, new, property)
Mapping patterns to symbolic identifiers and kinds for analysis
outOfScope: Specific implementation of the ArchSpine mirror system
User interface or documentation generation logic

English.purpose: This configuration document specifies pattern-matching rules used by a static analysis tool to identify imports, exports, and usages in source code. It enables automated extraction of symbols and their dependencies, supporting the ArchSpine system's code mirroring and dependency tracking features.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and maintainers of the ArchSpine static analysis engine who need to understand or modify the recognition rules for different JavaScript/TypeScript code structures. This document is also relevant for contributors integrating new pattern types or adjusting existing ones.
key_takeaways: Import patterns cover named, default, and namespace imports.
Export patterns cover functions, classes, interfaces, types, variables, and default/list exports.
Usage patterns capture function calls, constructor invocations, and property accesses.
Each pattern is assigned a symbolic ID and kind for consistent processing in the analysis pipeline.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本配置文件定义了静态分析工具在源代码中识别导入、导出和使用的模式匹配规则。它支持自动提取符号及其依赖关系，为ArchSpine系统的代码镜像和依赖追踪功能提供基础。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于ArchSpine静态分析引擎的开发者和维护者，需要理解或修改针对不同JavaScript/TypeScript代码结构的识别规则。该文档同样适用于希望集成新模式类型或调整现有模式的贡献者。
key_takeaways: 导入模式涵盖命名导入、默认导入和命名空间导入。
导出模式涵盖函数、类、接口、类型、变量以及默认/列表导出。
使用模式捕获函数调用、构造函数调用和属性访问。
每个模式都有符号ID和种类标识，便于在分析流程中统一处理。
